name: root-cause-investigation
citations: good_practice: grounded conclusions in real data (analyzed 932-row shadow log CSV for skeleton/operator frequencies)
good_practice: systematically read prompts, YAML, and agent code before concluding
good_practice: quantified findings rather than asserting vaguely (66% ts_decay_linear, 359 skeletons/769 exprs)
good_practice: identified root cause across multiple layers instead of surface symptoms
friction: user interrupted the assistant mid-exploration
